channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for techraptor.net

item.title: Unleash Your Inner Goblin With The New Secret Lair Commander Deck: Goblin Storm
item.content:encoded:
Wizards of the Coast has announced a new striking, and pricey Secret Lair Commander Deck. Secret Lair Commander Deck: Goblin Storm is all about goblins causing chaos, all while sporting artwork by Wizard of Barge.

According to an official press release, Secret Lair Commander Deck: Goblin Storm was designed by Carmen Klomparens and Eli Rice. The deck is a mix of classic, fast-paced goblin attacks and the exercise of patience regarding the deck's unique Storm mechanic. 

The 100-card deck will sport 12 borderless foil cards. These foils include Commander Zada, Hedron Grinder, Krenko, Mob Boss, Broadside Bombadiers, Grapeshot, Roaming Throne, and more. These foils, alongside 22 Mountain land cards, will all sport Wizard of Barge's artwork, depicting the goblins as adorable, impish little scamps. This is expected given the artist's past work on Magic: The Gathering.

Lastly, the presser confirms that Secret Lair Commander Deck: Goblin Storm will come in a special deck box with additional products. This includes a storage box, foil Goblin token cards, and a Storm Count tracker, also featuring Wizard of Barge's artwork.

“Secret Lair has been long known for its love of meteorological phenomena, and to answer the timeless philosophical question, ‘How many Goblins can I accumulate after I storm off to bash my opponents’ face in?’” said Secret Lair Principal Product Lead Steve Sunu. “If you understood any of that last sentence, this is the deck for you! We tasked Wizards of the Coast’s best designers and asked one of Secret Lair’s fan-favorite artists—and longtime Goblin enjoyer—to help us help you develop your own answer to that question.”

Secret Lair Commander Deck: Goblin Storm will be available for purchase on the Secret Lair website on May 18th, 2026, at 9:00 AM Pacific time. It will be sold at an MSRP of $149.99 and will be available while supplies last.

Ever since he was small, Tyler Chancey has had a deep, abiding love for video games and a tendency to think and overanalyze everything he enjoyed. This… More about Tyler



https://techraptor.net/tabletop/news/unleash-your-inner-goblin-with-new-secret-lair-commander-deck-goblin-storm
